title: Warehouse AGV Fleet: Fault-Telemetry Anomaly Scoring
isolation: candidate runs as an isolated stdin->stdout subprocess via isorun; labels/hidden data stay in the evaluator process
strategies: raw distance-to-global-mean (reproduces the evaluator baseline -> ~0.1 on every fleet)
per-feature standardized (z-score) distance-to-mean: fixes wildly-scaled fleets but collapses on multi-modal regimes and correlation-breaking faults

local-density kNN score in a robust (median/MAD) standardized space: adapts to global outliers, off-manifold correlation breakers, multi-modal regimes, scaled features and local outliers -> high geometric mean across the whole family
hybrid / structure-adaptive detectors (Mahalanobis or PCA reconstruction residual, LOF-style local reachability, iForest-style random partition depth) that model each fleet's structure
